title: horkelia tularensis
intro: Horkelia tularensis, also known as Tulare horkelia, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of California and Baja California in Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Horkelia tularensis are said to include relief from sore throats, coughs, and other respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Herbal preparations of Horkelia tularensis may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
